product_title: Shark Clean Sense Max Hepa Tower Air Purifier, Wifi Enabled, Charcoal Grey (hp232)
consensus_summary: The Shark Clean Sense Max HP232 is a well-regarded mid-range air purifier praised for effective HEPA filtration, quiet operation, and smart Wi-Fi connectivity. Users appreciate its tower design and coverage area, though some report mixed durability and occasional sensor reliability issues. Generally considered good value for the price point.
pros: Effective HEPA filtration captures dust, allergens, and particles
Quiet operation compared to other purifiers in class
Smart Wi-Fi control and app monitoring convenient
Sleek tower design fits modern home décor well
Good coverage area for medium to large rooms
Auto mode adjusts fan speed efficiently
Reasonably priced for feature set offered
cons: Filter replacement costs add up over time
Some users report decreased effectiveness after 6-12 months
Wi-Fi connectivity occasionally drops or requires resetting
Charcoal color shows dust and fingerprints easily
Fan noise increases noticeably on higher settings
Air quality sensor accuracy questioned by some users
Plastic construction feels less premium than price suggests
red_flags: Filter lifespan shorter than manufacturer claims for heavy use
Wi-Fi connectivity issues requiring frequent app restarts
Air quality sensor sometimes misreads or becomes unreliable
